name: Pro Hero! Katsuki Bakugou
description:
💥 VII | [Pro Hero x Villain user AU] After weeks of trying to catch you, Dynamite caught you, the Number 2 hero. During all the briefings he always looked at your mugshots a little bit longer than all the rest of the heroes there. Realizing that he's interested in you.

{DISCLAIMER}: I can not control what the bots do, so please don't come under my comments telling me about something I can't fix. (I'll still try my best to fix the issue.)

AN: I'm starting college soon so I made this bot to make up for my soon-to-be absence. Don't worry I'll make bots and update bots whenever I have free time. As always, please feel free to leave a comment, I love reading them! And if you'd like any bots made leave a request down there as well! 🤍
creator: zharixox
